metadata.name: tap-mongodb
metadata.summary: Singer.io tap for extracting data from MongoDB

functions.name: tap_mongodb.sync_strategies.oplog.maybe_get_session
documentation:
Try to get a session. If sessions are not available to us then return an object
that will work in the context manager

methods.name: tests.test_mongodb_incremental_open_transactions.MongoDBOpenTransactions.set_transaction_life_time_limit_seconds
documentation:
We observed an random exception "pymongo.errors.OperationFailure: Transaction 3 has been aborted."
This occurs when transaction session expires so this method increases this limit

classes.name: tap_mongodb.sync_strategies.common.UnsupportedReplicationKeyTypeException
documentation: Raised if key type is unsupported

classes.name: tap_mongodb.sync_strategies.common.MongoAssertionException
documentation: Raised if Mongo exhibits incorrect behavior

classes.name: tap_mongodb.sync_strategies.common.MongoInvalidDateTimeException
documentation: Raised if we find an invalid date-time that we can't handle

methods.name: tests.test_mongodb_id_pk_variations.MongoDbPrimaryKeyIdVariation.test_run
documentation: Running the test with all the available replication methods

classes.name: tests.test_mongodb_name_restrictions.MongoDBFieldNameRestrictions
documentation:
Test edge case field name restrictions per the documentation (use of '.' and '$')
Reference https://jira.talendforge.org/browse/TDL-18990 for details

classes.name: tests.test_mongodb_fname_restrictions.MongoDBFieldNameRestrictions
documentation:
Test edge case field name restrictions per the documentation (use of '.' and '$')
Reference https://jira.talendforge.org/browse/TDL-18990 for details

functions.name: tests.test_mongodb_datatype.run_mongodb_javascript
documentation:
Runs arbitrary javascript against the test Mongo instance. This is
useful for setting up situations that Python can't handle (e.g.,
datetime with year 0) for testing.

classes.name: tests.test_mongodb_cname_restrictions.MongoDBCollectionNameRestrictions
documentation:
Test edge case collection name restrictions per the documentation (leading '_' or digit)
Reference https://jira.talendforge.org/browse/TDL-18990 for details

classes.name: tests.test_mongodb_namespace_restrictions.MongoDBNameSpaceRestrictions
documentation:
Test edge case namespace restrictions per the documentation (120 byte max)
Reference https://jira.talendforge.org/browse/TDL-18990 for details

methods.name: tests.test_mongodb_discovery.MongoDBDiscovery.expected_primary_keys
documentation: Defaults to '_id' in discovery, standard ObjectId(), any value can be provided (TODO where?)
